subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God hath at this hour flowed forth from the Pen of Command in truth, and from it streameth the knowledge of what hath been and what shall be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من قلم الامر حینئذ قد کان بالحق مشهودا و منه جری علم ما کان و ما یکون
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God, @Word of God the cause of creation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
